impact: The daemon has repeatedly failed the same task through generated Python syntax errors and dataclass import-time behavior under importlib path loading. This guide gives the next autonomous cycle deterministic retry constraints: one module only, no dataclasses, py_compile first, preserve the existing MODULE_STATUS import sentinel, reuse the committed four-item fixture, and avoid broad fixture/test churn until the import guard passes.
summary: Add a narrow supervisor repair guide for the blocked missing-information validator retry.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 1 task(s) are blocked: Task checkbox-59: Add the missing-information output validator in the smallest possible Python module after the import test and four-item fixture pass, proving source backing, deduplication, action classification, and private-value rejection.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
